mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", u.idno AS "u.id", uid2.idno AS "uid2.id", a.zimu AS "zimu", a.bei AS "bei", a.mdr AS "mdr", a.is_top AS "isTop", a.isfanyi AS "isfanyi", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex", u.sign AS "u.sign", u.idno AS "u.idno", IFNULL(u.lianghao, '') AS "u.lianghao", IFNULL(u.city, '') AS "u.city",
uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon", uid2.idno AS "uid2.idno", IFNULL(uid2.lianghao, '') AS "uid2.lianghao", IFNULL(uid2.city, '') AS "uid2.city", uid2.sex AS "uid2.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_friend a
${dataScope}
AND (a.uid = #{u.id} OR u.idno LIKE concat('%',#{u.id},'%'))
AND (a.uid2 = #{uid2.id} OR uid2.idno LIKE concat('%',#{uid2.id},'%'))
AND u.idno LIKE concat('%',#{u.idno},'%')
AND uid2.idno LIKE concat('%',#{uid2.idno},'%')
AND u.lianghao LIKE concat('%',#{u.lianghao},'%')
AND uid2.lianghao LIKE concat('%',#{uid2.lianghao},'%')
AND a.mdr = #{mdr}
AND a.is_top = #{isTop}
AND (a.bei LIKE concat('%',#{key},'%') or uid2.nickname LIKE concat('%',#{key},'%') or uid2.idno = #{key})
ORDER BY ${page.orderBy}
ORDER BY a.zimu
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_friend( id, uid, uid2, zimu, bei, mdr, is_top, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{uid2.id}, #{zimu}, #{bei}, #{mdr}, #{isTop}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_friend SET uid = #{u.id}, uid2 = #{uid2.id}, zimu = #{zimu}, bei = #{bei}, mdr = #{mdr}, is_top = #{isTop}, isfanyi = #{isfanyi}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
